sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102861" key="teknodai/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεκνο-δαίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δαίω </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">Β</etym>)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, δαίνυμι</foreign>) <sense id="n102861.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">devouring his children</tr_>, Orac. ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:42:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.42.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
